requirement_topic.en: PSQCA PS Mark — Mandatory Pre-Market Certification for Air Conditioners and Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: PSQCA PS Mark——空调器及热泵强制上市前认证
requirement_topic.zht: PSQCA PS Mark——空調器及熱泵強制上市前認證

summary.en: Pakistan's Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA) administers mandatory pre-market approval for listed electrical goods, including air conditioners and heat-pump appliances. Products must obtain the PS Mark before import or sale. PSQCA adopts Pakistan Standards (PS) which are harmonised with IEC base standards. Importers or local agents must apply to PSQCA for product approval, provide test reports from accredited laboratories, and pass factory or batch inspection as required. The PS Mark must appear on the product and packaging. CCC and other foreign mandatory marks are not recognised as equivalent and do not substitute PSQCA approval.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦标准与质量控制局（PSQCA）对包括空调器和热泵电器在内的列管电气产品实施强制上市前审批。产品须在进口或销售前取得PS Mark标志。PSQCA采用与IEC基础标准协调的巴基斯坦标准（PS）。进口商或当地代理须向PSQCA申请产品审批，提供经认可实验室出具的测试报告，并按要求通过工厂或批次检验。产品及包装须标注PS Mark标志。CCC及其他境外强制性标志不被视为等效，不能替代PSQCA审批。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦標準與質量控制局（PSQCA）對包括空調器和熱泵電器在內的列管電氣產品實施強制上市前審批。產品須在進口或銷售前取得PS Mark標誌。PSQCA採用與IEC基礎標準協調的巴基斯坦標準（PS）。進口商或當地代理須向PSQCA申請產品審批，提供經認可實驗室出具的測試報告，並按要求通過工廠或批次檢驗。產品及包裝須標注PS Mark標誌。CCC及其他境外強制性標誌不被視為等效，不能替代PSQCA審批。

standards_or_laws: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority Act, 1996
PS / IEC 60335-2-40 (safety of heat pumps, air conditioners, dehumidifiers)
Mandatory product list notifications issued by PSQCA

summary.en: China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is the mandatory pre-market approval scheme for heat pumps and air conditioners sold in China, administered by CNCA. CCC relies on Chinese GB safety and EMC standards including GB 4706.32 and GB 4343.1. CCC certificates, factory inspection records, and Chinese-standard test reports are not accepted as evidence of conformity under PSQCA's PS Mark scheme and do not authorise import or sale in Pakistan.
summary.zh: 中国强制认证（CCC）是中国境内销售的热泵和空调器的强制上市前审批制度，由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）主管。CCC依托GB 4706.32、GB 4343.1等中国安全和电磁兼容标准。CCC证书、工厂检查记录和中国标准测试报告不被PSQCA PS Mark制度接受作为符合性证据，亦不授权在巴基斯坦进口或销售。
summary.zht: 中國強制認證（CCC）是中國境內銷售的熱泵和空調器的強制上市前審批制度，由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）主管。CCC依托GB 4706.32、GB 4343.1等中國安全和電磁相容標準。CCC證書、工廠檢查記錄和中國標準測試報告不被PSQCA PS Mark制度接受作為符合性證據，亦不授權在巴基斯坦進口或銷售。

gap.en: CCC does not substitute the PSQCA PS Mark. Chinese exporters targeting Pakistan must engage a local importer or authorised agent to apply for PSQCA pre-market approval, supply test reports from a PSQCA-recognised laboratory to PS (IEC-harmonised) standards, and support factory or batch inspections as required. The PS Mark must appear on the product label and packaging before customs clearance. Exporters should confirm whether the specific product is on the current PSQCA mandatory list and identify the applicable PS standard edition.
gap.zh: CCC不能替代PSQCA PS Mark。以巴基斯坦为目标市场的中国出口商须委托当地进口商或授权代理，按PS（与IEC协调的）标准向PSQCA申请上市前审批，提供PSQCA认可实验室出具的测试报告，并按要求配合工厂或批次检验。产品标签和包装须在清关前标注PS Mark标志。出口商应确认具体产品是否列入PSQCA现行强制清单，并识别适用的PS标准版本。
gap.zht: CCC不能替代PSQCA PS Mark。以巴基斯坦為目標市場的中國出口商須委托當地進口商或授權代理，按PS（與IEC協調的）標準向PSQCA申請上市前審批，提供PSQCA認可實驗室出具的測試報告，並按要求配合工廠或批次檢驗。產品標籤和包裝須在清關前標注PS Mark標誌。出口商應確認具體產品是否列入PSQCA現行強制清單，並識別適用的PS標準版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PS Mark required before import or sale; enforced at customs
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic Chinese market under CCC; CCC not recognised in Pakistan

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PSQCA PS Mark is mandatory before import; CCC is not recognised. A new Pakistan-specific approval process is required before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PSQCA PS Mark在进口前为强制性要求；CCC不被认可。在发货前须完成全新的巴基斯坦特定审批流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PSQCA PS Mark在進口前為強制性要求；CCC不被認可。在發貨前須完成全新的巴基斯坦特定審批流程。
